sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: RTX 2025년 2분기 매출 216억 달러, 상업 애프터마켓 16% 성장에 수요 견조

keyPoints.text: 2분기 매출이 216억 달러로 전년 대비 9%(유기적 9%) 증가했고, 수주가 매출을 크게 웃돌며 수요가 견조했다.
상업 애프터마켓이 16% 성장하며 분기 운영 성과를 이끌었다.
조정 EPS는 전년 대비 11% 늘었고, 영업현금흐름은 5억 달러를 기록했다.

riskChanges.text: 회사는 2025년 가이던스에 관세 영향과 최근 세제 개편 변화를 반영했으며, 이를 반영해 조정 EPS 전망을 종전보다 하향했다.

businessChanges.text: 콜린스의 시몬즈 프리시전 프로덕츠 사업을 7억 6,500만 달러에 매각했다.
회사는 상업·방산 시장의 강한 성장 수요에 대응하는 데 집중하고 있다고 밝혔다.

financialHighlights.text: 조정 EPS는 11% 증가했고, 영업현금흐름은 5억 달러를 기록했다.

watchItems.text: 관세 영향이 반영된 2025년 가이던스(조정 매출 최대 855억 달러)의 달성 여부를 지켜봐야 한다.
상업 애프터마켓 성장세 지속과 잉여현금흐름 가이던스 상단 75억 달러 도달 여부를 확인할 필요가 있다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: RTX Reports Q2 2025 Results RTX delivers 9% sales growth with strong commercial aftermarket and operational performance in Q2; Robust demand with RTX Q2 book-to-bill of 1.86 ARLINGTON, Va., July 22, 2025 – RTX (NYSE: RTX) reports second quarter 2025 results. Second quarter 2025 • Sales of $21.6 billion, up 9 percent versus prior year, and up 9 percent organically* excluding divestitures • GAAP EPS of $1.22, including $0.28 of acquisition accounting adjustments and $0.06 of restructuring and other net significant and/or no n-recurring items • Adjusted EPS* of $1.56 , up 11 percent versus prior year • Operating cash flow of $0.5 billion ; free cash outflow* of $0  Normalized numeric aliases: $21.6 billion = 216억 달러; $0.5 billion = 5억 달러; $0.1 billion = 1억 달러; $236 billion = 2,360억 달러; $144 billion = 1,440억 달러; $92 billion = 920억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $21.6 = 21.6달러; $0.28 = 0.28달러; $236 = 236달러; 11 percent = 11%; $144 = 144달러; $92 = 92달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러; 9 percent = 9%; 8 percent = 8%.

Collins’ Simmonds Precision Products business for $765 million Updates outlook for full year 2025 • Outlook reflects strong first half operational performance and incorporates the expected impact of tariffs and changes associated with recently enacted tax legislation • Adjusted sales* of $84.75 - $85.5 billion, up from $83.0 - $84.0 billion • Organic sales growth* of 6 to 7 percent, up from 4 to 6 percent • Adjusted EPS* of $5.80 - $5.95, down from $6.00 - $6.15 • Confirms free cash flow* of $7.0 - $7.5 billion “We continued our momentum in the second quarter with organic sales and profit growth* across all three segments, including 16 percent commercial afterm  Normalized numeric aliases: $765 million = 7억 6,500만 달러; $85.5 billion = 855억 달러; $84.0 billion = 840억 달러; $7.5 billion = 75억 달러; $236 billion = 2,360억 달러; $765 = 765달러; $84.75 = 84.75달러; $85.5 = 85.5달러; $84.0 = 84.0달러; $7.0 = 7.0달러; 16 percent = 16%; $7.5 = 7.5달러; $236 = 236달러; 7 percent = 7%; 6 percent = 6%; 15 percent = 15%.

ies in the quarter.” “Our updated outlook reflects strong operational performance in the first half and incorporates our current assessment of the impact of tariffs. We are focused on delivering on the strong growth in our commercial and defense end markets and remain well positioned to drive long term profitable growth.” 1 *Adjusted net sales (also referred to as adjusted sales), organic sales, adjusted operating profit (loss) and margin percentage (ROS), adjusted segment operating profit (loss) and margin percentage (ROS), adjusted net income, adjusted earnings per share (“EPS”), adjusted effective tax rate, and free cash flow are non-GAAP financial measures.
